mapper.select: SELECT board_id, title, hit_cnt, creator_id, DATE_FORMAT(created_datetime, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created_datetime FROM t_board WHERE deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY board_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_board(title, contents, created_datetime, creator_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{contents}, NOW(), #{creatorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_board SET hit_cnt = hit_cnt + 1 WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
UPDATE t_board SET title = #{title}, contents = #{contents}, updated_datetime = NOW(), updater_id = #{updaterId} WHERE board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_file(board_id, original_file_name, stored_file_path, file_size, creator_id, created_datetime) VALUES
(#{item.boardId}, #{item.originalFileName}, #{item.storedFilePath}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.creatorId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT file_idx, board_id, original_file_name, ROUND(file_size/1024) AS file_size, stored_file_path, creator_id FROM t_file WHERE board_id = #{boardId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT file_idx, board_id, original_file_name, stored_file_path FROM t_file WHERE file_idx = #{fileIdx}
SELECT board_id, title, hit_cnt, creator_id, DATE_FORMAT(created_datetime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_datetime FROM t_board ORDER BY board_id DESC LIMIT #{skip}, #{amount}
